reviews.review_description: I got banned a couple months ago for being to good and then a dev joined he had the stick and the kid told the dev and then the dev reported me and then I got banned for 8 weeks

I got banned for 4 weeks because I was in a city lobby and chefrizz banned me. I was in a city lobby and he wasn't there so I was looking for something to buy and I looked on the leader board and I knew it was chefrizz because I saw him in another lobby. And during that encounter with me and him he left and joined again and I saw him press my name and pressed something else which banned me for 4 weeks and I hope my ban is shortened because I did nothing wrong I was just playing the game. But other than that the game is great
